WELCOME TO ECOMMERCE MASTERS
Topic Progress:
Welcome to Ecommerce Masters! This course is laser focused on two words: growing
and scaling your online store. Maybe you’ve seen some success in your existing store
and want to reach the 7-figure mark. But, let’s be honest, what got you here is not what’s
going to get you there.
So throughout the course, we’ll give you five different options for exploding your
business: facebook ads, product development, manufacturing & logistics, influencer
marketing, and email marketing.
Inside are the most effective and cutting edge tactics and frameworks proven to increase
sales and boost revenue for ecommerce businesses looking to scale.
Since ecommerce founders are often dealing with such specific pain points, we've
decided to open up the course structure so that you can navigate to any module, any
lesson, any time you like.
MEET YOUR INSTRUCTORS
Scaling with Facebook Ads: Nick Shackelford, Founder of Structured Social
Nick is a world class expert in paid media and a multi-time founder specializing in
scaling stores through Facebook Ads. All in, he’s spent upwards of $85 million in
Facebook Ads across multiple industries! He’ll show you everything you need to know
to profitably scale your store the right way.
Advanced Influencer Marketing: Gretta Van Riel, 5X Founder of SkinnyMe Tea,
Dropbottle, The 5th, Skintox and Hey Influencers
Along with running a leading Influencer Marketing platform that’s already linked more
than 8,000 influencers to brands, Gretta has helped pioneer influencer marketing to
scale 4 of her own brands beyond 7-figures in just 4 years flat. Inside Ecommerce
Masters she dives into her own YouTube influencer acquisition strategy, her Influencer
Funnel, and even how to manage more than a thousand influencers at once!
Product Success Formula: Rob Ward, Founder of Annex Products

-- 1 of 3 --

Rob successfully bootstrapped Quad Lock from 0 to $9 million dollars in just four years
and today has sold millions of units shipping to over 100 countries. He’s a Shopify Build-
A-Business Winner and an absolute master at scaling stores using new products.
Advanced Operations, Manufacturing & Supply Chain: Rich Li, Founder of July
and Brosa
As a Chinese native, Richard has deep networks in China and wider Asia. He has supply
chain capabilities and knowledge unlike anyone we’ve ever seen. His luggage startup
July is already on track to achieve $5M in revenue in its first year of operations. “He’ll
help you set up your operations so scaling is streamlined instead of mass chaos.”
Multi-Million Dollar Ecommerce Email Marketing: Chase Dimond, Co-Founder of
Boundless Labs
Chase has sent hundreds of millions of emails for his 7 and 8-figure ecommerce clients
as well as his own brand and generated more than $20 million in email attributable
revenue. He’ll help you maximize the #1 revenue generator for all online businesses,
your email list.
WHAT TO EXPECT
Our goal is to take our real-world experiences building and scaling ecommerce stores
using each of our superpowers and teach everything we’ve learned. These are rock solid
frameworks we’ve built over time. We’ll boil our strategies down into actionable, easy-
to-digest exercises and examples that any entrepreneur and business owner can follow
and apply to get massive results.
Each lesson comes with:
A bite-sized video
Action items
A corresponding workbook
Tools & Resources
WHO IS THIS COURSE FOR?
This course is not for beginners. This course is for existing entrepreneurs who want to
scale their businesses to the 7-figure mark and beyond. You may be experiencing
massive growth and want to 2x your efforts or perhaps you’ve hit a slump and you need
a quick jump start. We’ve got you covered!
HOW TO GET THE MOST FROM THIS COURSE
In order to maximize your results and get sales upon launch, we strongly recommend
that you:
Mark your calendar to block out a daily slot for at least 1 hour to fully commit to
learning. Remember, success is a habit.
Watch every video in the course, take lots of notes, do the workbook exercises and
check out the tools and resources provided.
Most importantly — TAKE ACTION. Nobody said building a successful ecommerce
business was easy, and you will at times run into blockers. But action now is better than
